summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.negative: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.neutral: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.title: Nvidia's next-gen AI rack system delayed to 2028 on manufacturing snags, SemiAnalysis says
raw_articles.summary: The reported delay adds to concerns that Nvidia's breakneck annual release cadence is colliding with manufacturing limits.

raw_articles.title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
raw_articles.summary: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google’s privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as “images, files, and audio and video recordings,” to improve its AI models.

raw_articles.title: I tested the new Claude Desktop on Linux - here's how it compares to rival apps
raw_articles.summary: Claude Code finally has an official Linux desktop app. It's a great option, but trying to use local AI is where things get tricky.

raw_articles.title: How Open Models Are Driving AI Research
raw_articles.summary: Every year, the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) reveals where thousands of AI researchers have decided to put their work.  This year’s accepted papers reveal a clear direction: open frontier models and open AI infrastructure have become foundational to how modern AI science gets done. NVIDIA had 74 papers accepted at ICML 2026. Approximately […]

raw_articles.title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
raw_articles.summary: Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sales the hardest.

raw_articles.title: Reddit is using LLMs to solve a problem LLMs largely created
raw_articles.summary: In the AI era, platforms have no choice but to fight fire with fire to cull spam.

raw_articles.title: How Nations Are Deploying AI for Strategic Priorities
raw_articles.summary: Nations have long invested in domestic infrastructure to advance their economies, protect and use their data, and take advantage of technology opportunities in areas such as transportation, communications, commerce, entertainment and healthcare. AI, the most important technology of our time, is turbocharging innovation across every facet of society. Countries are investing in AI capabilities so […]

raw_articles.title: What billions of AI predictions taught Expedia before the age of AI agents
raw_articles.summary: There's an important distinction between AI that just works today, and AI that lasts at scale. Many companies optimize hard for the first one without ever asking whether they're building the second.Velocity without discipline and strategic direction is a liability, not an asset. The hardest part of building AI at scale isn't getting a model to work once. Why “line of sight” fails as a practical VHF planning model.2. How refraction, reflection, diffraction, and scattering deliver or destroy signals where geometry alone cannot predict.3.
